title: McGraw Hill's IoT Ecosystem for Education
description: A flowchart illustrating how McGraw Hill India integrates IoT concepts into their educational ecosystem for Module 5, connecting learning content, devices, and platforms.
relationships: Learner interacts with Smart Devices to access content
Devices send usage and performance data to the Cloud Analytics engine
Cloud engine processes data to provide personalized insights and recommendations
Educator receives analytics to monitor progress and adapt teaching strategies
